name: Jamaican Jerk Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, puree all ingredients except the wings.
2. Place the wings in a large shallow dish and pour the marinade over them.
3. Rub the marinade into the wings using rubber gloves.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, or preferably overnight.
5. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C).
6. Arrange wings in a single layer on an oiled rack set over a foil-lined roasting pan.
7. Pour any remaining marinade over the wings.
8. Bake in the upper third of the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes, or until cooked through.
